final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [23:0] analog_input,
    output reg [11:0] digital_output
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            digital_output <= 12'b0;
        end else begin
            digital_output <= analog_input[23:12]; // Take the most significant 12 bits
        end
    end
endmodule
